title: ScenarioOverlay
description: Editorial overlay per scenario per locale (ADR-017). Lives at data/i18n/[locale]/scenarios/[id].json. Merged with the base scenario record at fetch time. Carries every user-facing string surfaced in the /fly identity HUD and CAPCOM event ticker.

dep_label.description: Short label for the departure event ("Earth dep" in en-US).

arr_label.description: Short label for the arrival event ("Earth return").

met.description: Mission Elapsed Time in days since departure.
